subject: Blue-skinned humanoid with white spiky hair, red eyes, roaring mouth open, in white and gold outfit against red energy burst
description: A blue-skinned humanoid figure with wild white spiky hair and vivid red eyes stands with mouth open in a roar or battle cry. The outfit is white and gold with structured chest plating, including a visible teal emblem on the chest. The figure is rendered at a three-quarter angle, arms positioned at the sides in a display of raw power rather than an active strike. Behind the figure, an intense red and white energy burst radiates outward in all directions — the card's dominant visual energy. The whole composition reads as a villain announcing their power.
foreground: Blue-skinned humanoid with white spiky hair, red eyes, open-mouth roar, white/gold outfit with teal chest emblem
background: Intense red and white energy burst, radial pattern
emotion: Overwhelming aggression, power declaration via open-mouth roar
